title: Ethiopian Keto Black Bean Toast
description: A twist on traditional toast, this Ethiopian-inspired dish replaces bread with crispy flatbread and adds the flavors of Africa to a keto black bean recipe.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the ethiopian spices to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked black beans to the pan and stir to combine with the spices.
Crack in the fluffy scrambled eggs and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the eggs are set.
Meanwhile, toast the light flatbread slices until crispy.
Assemble the dish by placing the black bean and egg mixture onto the flatbread.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
